# Canary

> Canary makes limited-run keyboards for people who treat their setup as part of their identity. Hero product: the Canary C01, a 65% die-cast aluminum mechanical keyboard released in numbered capsules.

## Product: Canary C01 Capsule

The Canary C01 is the first object in the Canary system.

- **Form factor:** 65% layout, 68 keys
- **Chassis:** Die-cast aluminum
- **Connectivity:** Tri-mode — USB-C, 2.4 GHz wireless, Bluetooth
- **Keycaps:** Three-color PBT
- **Switches:** Wing (45g tactile) or Canary (50g clicky)
- **Edition:** Capsule 01 — 600 units total, 200 per colorway, numbered 001 to 200
- **Colorways:** Signal, Recon, Strike
- **Price:** USD 175–225 (final pricing confirmed at drop)
- **Release model:** Single release window per capsule. No restocks within a capsule.

## How to buy

Canary releases capsules in a single time-boxed window. There is no continuous availability — when a capsule sells out, it does not return. Customers join the "Early Birds" (Canary's notify list) to receive the drop time, product link, and serial range before public release.

- Notify list signup: https://www.canary.store/#capture
- Drop status: see homepage hero ("Drop · TBA" or live countdown)

## Brand positioning

- Founded 2026
- Positioning: "Canary makes limited-run keyboards for people who treat their setup as part of their identity."
- Launch message: "Canary C01 is a limited-run 65% die-cast aluminum mechanical keyboard built to transform your desk, sound premium, and make your setup feel intentional."
- Audience: setup-culture buyers (clean/cozy/dark-academia/WFH desks, creators) and keyboard enthusiasts who care about materials, sound, switches, and build.
- Aesthetic peers / reference points: Teenage Engineering (industrial design), Studio Neat (small-batch desk goods), Aesop (typographic restraint).

## Roadmap

Canary releases its system "in chapters." After C01, additional objects in the system include keycap sets, switches, mats, and crates. Each is numbered and time-boxed in the same way.

## Frequently asked questions

**What is the Canary C01?**
A 65%, 68-key mechanical keyboard with a die-cast aluminum chassis, tri-mode wireless, and PBT keycaps. It is the first product from Canary.

**How many Canary C01 keyboards are being made?**
600 units total in Capsule 01: 200 each of Signal, Recon, and Strike colorways. Each unit is numbered 001 to 200 within its colorway.

**What switches does the Canary C01 use?**
Two switch options at launch: Wing (45 g tactile) and Canary (50 g clicky).

**Is the Canary C01 wireless?**
Yes — tri-mode: USB-C wired, 2.4 GHz wireless via dongle, and Bluetooth.

**Will the Canary C01 be restocked?**
No. Canary capsules are single-window releases. When Capsule 01 sells out, the C01 will not be reissued in the same form.

**When does the Canary C01 drop?**
Drop date is announced to the Early Birds (the Canary notify list) before public release. Current status is shown on the homepage hero.

**How much does the Canary C01 cost?**
USD 175 to 225 depending on configuration. Final pricing is confirmed at drop.

**Where can I contact Canary?**
- General: hello@canary.store
- Press: press@canary.store
